dialogos.texto_en: Hmmmm...\nI wonder what this is.
Yotsuba? What's wrong?
Ah, Itsuki and Uesugi-san!\nI wanted to ask you something.
What's up?
Do you know about Hija cuisine?\nI saw it written on that sign over there\nand it caught my attention.
Well, I think I came across it\nwhen I was researching Okinawan cuisine...\nbut I can't quite remember.
It says 'sashimi,' so I'm thinking it's a fish dish.
So, Hija must be the name of a fish?
...Hey.\nYotsuba, you didn't even read the sign properly.
Huh?
There's an explanation written below.
Huh?!
For sure, it's really written there. I was careless.
Way too careless.\nLet me see, now?
Hmm, it seems to be a goat dish.\n'Hija' is the Okinawan word for goat.
Oh, I seee. So it's lamb meat, right?
No, isn't it mutton?
Both of you are wrong. Lamb and mutton are both sheep.
Huh? They're both sheep, with different names?
Ahh, I remember now.\nLamb is baby sheep and mutton is adult sheep.\nThat's the difference.
Nino might know more about this.
Uesugi-san, you're quite knowledgeable too.
Well, leaving aside sheep meat,\ngoat meat dishes are quite rare.
What does goat meat taste like?
I've never had it before.
Okay, let's look it up on our phones.\nHija, Hija... There it is.
Let's see here.\nIt seems that Hija is healthy meat.
Healthy meat?!\nDoes such a thing really exist?!
And it also seems to be really nutritious.\nIt's said to be medicinal.
Wow, that's some amazing meat.
But it seems to have a strong taste\nthat not everyone likes.
That actually makes me more curious.\nI really want to try it.
If it's healthy,\nthat means we can eat a lot of it without any problems!
Of course you would care about that. \nEven though you're usually overindulging anyway.
WHA?! Y-you are so RUDE, Uesugi-kun!\nI'm not someone who eats unreasonable amounts%p-2;――
Ah!
What's up?
Well... Of course, Uesu%p-2;――
Fu-Futaro, you'd hate me if I was overweight, wouldn't you?
What do you mean by, 'of course'?
Well, as a matter of common sense,\nit's preferred for someone to be thin...\nyou know?
Ah, I see.\nIt doesn't really bother me though.
I-I see!
Teehee.
Wh-what?
I don't really care.
I-is that so.
Well, it goes without saying\nthat maintaining good health is crucial\nand unhealthy living is out of the question.
Teehee, of course.\nI actually eat for my health.
But considering the amount you eat%p-2;――
F-for me, it's an appropriate amount!
Just kidding.\nYou can keep eating as much as you like.
I was going to do that anyway.
Teehee.
Wh-what?
To be honest, I'd be more worried if you lost weight.
Huh? Why is that?
It would be troubling if you were to lose your appetite, right?
Mmmh...
B-before it would even get to that point,\nI'd talk to you about it first, Uesu... Futaro.
Also, it's not just about losing your appetite.\nEating too much to the point of being unhealthy\nis out of the question too, you know?
I know that, even without you telling me.\nI won't let myself get sick and worry you!
Teehee.
Wh-what?
No, no, I mean, you two really are a perfect match.
From the way you talk,\nit's clear how well you get along with each other!
(Not that it's a bad thing, but...\n it's kind of embarrassing\n to hear it said out loud like this.)
...If that's how it looks, then I'm happy.
You guys TOTALLY look like a cute couple!\nHee-hee!
Yotsuba! You don't have to constantly repeat that!
